ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand using this size chart */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style using this size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "country_standard" TEXT /* Country-specific standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the size chart */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the brand data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the style is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the style is designed (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the style data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the category is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the category data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart used for the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the product is made of */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is designed (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the product data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock for this size */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product for this size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the product size data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
